name: User Signed Up
description: Fires when a user successfully creates a new account.

name: User Logged In
description: Fires when a user successfully authenticates via any method.

name: User Logged Out
description: Fires when a user explicitly logs out.

name: Session Wizard Opened
description: Fires when the session creation wizard modal is opened.

name: Session Created
description: Fires when a new session is successfully created in step 1 of the wizard.

name: AI Questions Generated
description: Fires when the AI successfully generates questions for a session.

name: Session Launched
description: Fires when the host completes the wizard and navigates to the launchpad.

name: Session Started
description: Fires when a draft session transitions to live or energizing state.

name: Session Closed
description: Fires when a host closes a live session.

name: Participant Joined
description: Fires when a participant successfully connects to a live session via join code.

name: Template Selected
description: Fires when a user selects a template to start a session from.

name: Session Duplicated
description: Fires when a user duplicates an existing session.

name: Session Exported
description: Fires when a user downloads session results as CSV.

name: Session Saved As Template
description: Fires when a user saves a closed session as a custom template.

name: AI Insights Viewed
description: Fires when the insights section becomes visible on the dashboard.

name: AI Insight Analyzed
description: Fires when a user triggers AI analysis on a specific closed session.

name: Pricing Page Viewed
description: Fires when a user views the pricing page.

name: Upgrade Clicked
description: Fires when a user clicks an upgrade or trial CTA on the pricing page.

name: Error Encountered
description: Fires when a user-facing error occurs in a critical flow.
